name: history
_note: root.history lists the caller's saved computations (most recent first) from the per-user notebook. The assassin's internal owner actor returns ok:true with an empty page (no no_user / no_db). limit is a fail-CLOSED numeric guard (badNumericField) — a poisoned value (NaN/Infinity/negative/huge/non-numeric) returns ok:false invalid_limit, never a clamped ok:true. The returned page can never exceed total.
